name: level_complete_title
description: Display lettering: the words "Level Complete" in exactly that spelling, arched banner composition, chunky knitted-yarn letters in gold and teal with a red felt ribbon beneath, celebratory win-card style. No other text.
prompt_extra: gently arched baseline; thick friendly letterforms with subtle outline and top-light gloss

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, cozier tones and a touch more craft detail

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly simpler, more minimal composition with bolder shapes
